Inaugural address of President Rodrigo Roa Duterte

Posted on June 30, 2016

MALACAÑAN PALACE

MANILA

BY THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES

My fellow Filipinos, today I stand before you to lay down my vision for the Philippines. We will build a nation where every citizen has the opportunity to succeed. This administration will pursue a relentless campaign against corruption at every level of government. We will ensure that public funds are used for their intended purposes and that government services reach those who need them most.

WHEREAS, the people have spoken and given their mandate for change, we shall honor that mandate by working tirelessly for the common good. The challenges before us are great, but I am confident that together, we can overcome them. Our priorities include improving infrastructure, strengthening our healthcare system, and providing quality education for all Filipino children.

I call upon every Filipino to join me in this journey towards a stronger, more prosperous nation. Let us set aside our differences and work together for the future of our children and our children's children. Thank you, and may God bless the Philippines.
